message:
feat(abi): expand resolv ABI bindings and update beads tracker

Extend resolv_abi.rs with additional DNS resolver function bindings
for broader glibc ABI coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -154,7 +154,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-2a2","title":"Epic: Reverse-Round Methodology (R7-R41)","description":"Systematic mapping of 31 glibc subsystems to alien math via reverse-rounds R7-R41. R7: Loader/symbol/IFUNC (tropical scheduling, sheaf gluing, regret). R8: Allocator/nptl (mean-field, SOS barriers, rough-path). R9: Format/locale (weighted VPA, semiring transducers). R10: NSS/resolv (POMDP, Hawkes, OT). R11: libm/fenv (Remez minimax, machine-checked bounds). R12-R41: 30 more subsystem-to-math mappings.

## Success Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Success Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:58:38.161872398Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:15.443423298Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["epic","frankenlibc","methodology","reverse-round"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2a2","depends_on_id":"bd-5vr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":741,"issue_id":"bd-2a2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien+Extreme uplift pass (2026-02-13): this epic is now covered by the full open-backlog EV matrix at artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.json (summary markdown: artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.md).

Execution contract applied:
- One-lever optimization waves only (profile -> prove -> implement -> verify).
- Budgeted mode + deterministic fallback trigger required per child bead.
- Graveyard route mappings and baseline comparators are pre-attached in matrix rows.
- Promotion gate: EV >= 2.0 and no cycle introduction in bv --robot-insights.","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:25:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-2a2.1","title":"Reverse-Round: R7-R11 core subsystem mappings (Loader, Allocator, Format, NSS, libm)","description":"Complete R7-R11 reverse-round mappings: R7 Loader/symbol/IFUNC (tropical scheduling, sheaf gluing, regret bounds), R8 Allocator/nptl (mean-field games, SOS barriers, rough-path signatures), R9 Format/locale (weighted VPA, semiring transducers), R10 NSS/resolv (robust POMDP, Hawkes point processes, optimal transport), R11 libm/fenv (Remez minimax, machine-checked error bounds).

## Acceptance Criteria

 {"id":"bd-2a2.5","title":"Reverse-Round: E2E tests - cross-round integration and branch-diversity verification","description":"E2E tests: verify multiple rounds compose correctly (e.g., allocator round R8 interacts with loader round R7 without violating safety lattice). Verify branch-diversity constraint across round milestones. Regression tests ensuring no round mapping regresses when upstream math kernels change.

## Acceptance Criteria

Verified via rch exec cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test reverse_round_contracts_test -- --nocapture and rch exec cargo check --workspace --all-targets. Workspace cargo fmt --check and cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings remain blocked by unrelated pre-existing worktree issues in crates/frankenlibc-abi/build.rs, crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/structured_log_test.rs, and crates/frankenlibc-membrane/tests/alien_cs_e2e_test.rs.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e-test","frankenlibc","reverse-round","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-32e.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-5vr.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2a2.6","title":"Reverse-Round: Logging - round execution, math family selection, coverage metrics","description":"Logging spec for reverse-rounds: TRACE for per-subsystem math application detail, DEBUG for math family selection decisions and diversity constraint checks, INFO for round completion and coverage milestone events, WARN for diversity constraint near-violations (single family approaching 40% threshold), ERROR for constraint violations. All records include trace_id.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MagentaFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:42.343421838Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T06:21:18.977440460Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T06:21:18.977370990Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","logging","observability","reverse-round"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-32e.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-5vr.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2a2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-oai.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":742,"issue_id":"bd-2a2.6","author":"MagentaFalcon","text":"Completed reverse-round logging coverage in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/runtime_math/mod.rs` and validated via remote offload (`rch`).

Implemented reverse-round events and metrics:
- `runtime_reverse_round_math_selection` (`debug`): emits active-family count, total decisions, dominant family/share.
- `runtime_reverse_round_coverage_milestone` (`info`): emits milestone target/reached status.
- `runtime_reverse_round_diversity_near_violation` (`warn`) and `runtime_reverse_round_diversity_violation` (`error`): emitted from dominant-family share threshold checks.

Also ensured traceability fields (`trace_id`, mode/family/symbol/decision_path/healing/errno/latency/artifact refs) are present in export rows and extended unit assertions to require reverse-round events.

Validation evidence (all via `rch`):
1. `cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane runtime_math_log_jsonl_export -- --nocapture` ✅
2. `cargo check -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets` ✅
3. `cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-membrane --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
4. `cargo fmt --check --package frankenlibc-membrane` ✅","created_at":"2026-02-25T06:21:14Z"}]}

 {"id":"bd-34s.3","title":"Proofs: Galois connection + monotonic safety + probability bounds","description":"Formal proofs for: Galois connection (gamma(alpha(c)) >= c), monotonic safety (lattice join idempotent, states only move toward more restrictive), P(undetected corruption) <= 2^-64 (SipHash collision probability), UAF detection P=1 (generational arena completeness), buffer overflow P(miss) <= 2^-64.

-{"id":"bd-34s.6","title":"Proofs: E2E tests - proof chain integrity and cross-obligation consistency","description":"E2E tests: verify proof chain integrity (proof A depends on proof B's conclusion), cross-obligation consistency (no two proofs make contradictory assumptions), full proof-obligation dashboard verification. Regression: re-run all proofs after any math kernel change.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:29.311630840Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:23.615660095Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e-test","frankenlibc","proofs","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34s.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.6","depends_on_id":"bd-34s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.6","depends_on_id":"bd-34s.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:29.311630840Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T01:39:46.600728938Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e-test","frankenlibc","proofs","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34s.6","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.6","depends_on_id":"bd-34s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.6","depends_on_id":"bd-34s.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-34s.7","title":"Proofs: Logging - proof verification events, artifact integrity checks","description":"Logging spec for proofs: TRACE for individual proof step verification, DEBUG for Gram matrix eigenvalue checks and hash computations, INFO for proof obligation pass/fail summary and artifact loading, WARN for proof assumptions approaching boundary conditions, ERROR for proof verification failure or hash mismatch. All records include trace_id.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MagentaFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:05:42.909863740Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T07:03:21.801795185Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T07:03:21.801770779Z","close_reason":"Implemented proof verification logging + artifact integrity checks with deterministic tests; verification evidence logged in comment #570.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankenlibc","logging","observability","proofs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34s.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2a2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.7","depends_on_id":"bd-2hh.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.7","depends_on_id":"bd-34s","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.7","depends_on_id":"bd-5vr.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-34s.7","depends_on_id":"bd-oai.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":949,"issue_id":"bd-34s.7","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed proof logging + artifact integrity instrumentation for harness proof gates.

Code changes:
- Added structured TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR proof events in runtime_math_linkage_proofs and runtime_math_determinism_proofs, including deterministic boundary-assumption emission and per-step proof telemetry.
- Added sidecar proof-log emission + artifact resolution provenance in evidence_compliance (proof log file: evidence_compliance.proof.log.jsonl), plus violations for unwritable proof logs and detailed hash/index/schema diagnostics.
- Added/updated tests: runtime_math_linkage_proofs_test, runtime_math_determinism_proofs_test, evidence_compliance_test (including hash mismatch log regression).

Verification (CPU-intensive operations offloaded with rch):
1) rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets
   - PASS (Finished dev profile; exit=0).
2) rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_math_linkage_proofs_test --test runtime_math_determinism_proofs_test --test evidence_compliance_test -- --nocapture
   - PASS (all three test binaries passed: 2/2, 2/2, 5/5).
3) rch exec -- cargo fmt --check --package frankenlibc-harness
   - PASS (exit=0).
4) rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings
   - FAIL due pre-existing unrelated lint debt in crates/frankenlibc-core/src/string/regex.rs (unused variable/fields, collapsible_if, needless_bool).

Representative failure signatures captured for triage:
- error: unused variable: ch (regex.rs:540)
- error: this if statement can be collapsed (regex.rs:331, 371)
- error: this if-then-else expression returns a bool literal (regex.rs:955)","created_at":"2026-02-25T07:03:01Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-34w","title":"Verification matrix drift guard: fail when critique beads lack matrix coverage","description":"Deliverables:
- Add deterministic check that compares open critique bead set against matrix rows.
- Missing rows must fail with actionable diagnostics.

Acceptance:
- New critique bead without matrix row is detected immediately.
- Failure output includes exact bead IDs and missing fields.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCove","created_at":"2026-02-11T05:52:33.016831175Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T06:38:36.416332Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T06:38:36.416332Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","critique","testing","verification"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-34w","depends_on_id":"bd-1s7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:31Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":950,"issue_id":"bd-34w","author":"CrimsonCove","text":"## Deliverables Complete

### 1. CI gate: scripts/check_matrix_drift.sh
4 checks:
- Matrix file exists
- Drift detection (compare open/in_progress critique beads vs matrix rows)
- Entry schema validation (bead_id, title, obligations, coverage, coverage_summary)
- Dashboard consistency (stats match entries)

### 2. Integration tests: crates/glibc-rs-harness/tests/matrix_drift_test.rs
6 tests:
- drift_guard_script_exists_and_executable
- all_open_critique_beads_have_matrix_rows
- matrix_entries_have_valid_schema
- dashboard_total_matches_entries
- dashboard_coverage_stats_consistent
- no_duplicate_bead_entries

### Test commands
cargo test -p glibc-rs-harness --test matrix_drift_test
bash scripts/check_matrix_drift.sh

All 6 tests pass. CI gate passes (0 missing rows, 0 stale). Clippy clean.","created_at":"2026-02-11T06:38:36.416332Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-35a","title":"Expected-loss policy: API-family loss matrices for Repair vs Deny vs PassThrough","description":"Critique mapping: #5 + alien-artifact requirement.

Deliverables:
- Define explicit loss matrices per API family.
- Implement decision rule argmin_a E[L(a,C)|evidence].
- Publish assumptions and sensitivity analysis.

Acceptance:
- Every hardened repair action is attributable to a documented expected-loss decision.
- Evidence ledger includes posterior + selected action + competing action costs.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"Implemented expected-loss policy with per-API-family matrices and argmin_a E[L(a,C)|evidence] in runtime_math loss_minimizer, plus evidence-ledger fields for posterior + selected/competing expected costs. Added deterministic evidence harness scripts/bd35a_evidence_run.sh producing schema-compliant JSONL + artifact index for strict/hardened runs. Validation commands: scripts/bd35a_evidence_run.sh; scripts/check_structured_logs.sh. Evidence artifacts: tests/cve_arena/results/bd-35a/bd35a-20260211T063028Z/trace.jsonl and tests/cve_arena/results/bd-35a/bd35a-20260211T063028Z/artifact_index.json (plus per-case stdout/stderr under strict/ and hardened/).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"WhiteMeadow","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:11.317455130Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T06:31:31.821249465Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T06:31:31.821231431Z","close_reason":"Implemented per-family expected-loss matrices + runtime evidence fields; strict/hardened evidence-run logs and artifact index generated","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","critique","decision-theory","math"]}
